title: Yyz's Backpacks + Immersive Interfaces
description: Textures for each backpack to use alongside Immersive Interfaces!
body: ![Example Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/282dcd9d27bc18b68bb43e7d6667f63ff6a76fed.png)A Simple resourcepack to replace the slot textures for each backpack to be more in line with the Immersive Interfaces resourcepack. That's all!
